title: Turtle Imagined
description: [WIP] Turtle Imagined is a V2 version of TurtleShaders focused on a high-end RTX-style look with improved visuals and reflections.
body:
[![Mod](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/turtleshaders?logo=modrinth&label=&style=flat&color=242629&labelColor=00AF5C&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/shader/turtleshaders)



![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d760168d13a047c64356052e065378875b92cb05.jpeg)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WXPhe78g3tc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



**ABOUT**

Turtle Imagined is a reworked version of [TurtleShaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/turtleshaders) featuring high-quality block reflections, rainy surface reflections, improved lighting, and enhanced visual effects for a more realistic and immersive experience. More features are currently in development.

[![YT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f48639fd7b91b3a2c29f76ac474ba419a01a109.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@GlacierServicesMC)

### Features

- Reflections

- Better Water reflections

- Wavy water with smooth, natural movement

- Realistic clouds for an immersive atmosphere

- Water reflections on blocks during rain

- [Distant horizon](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) support for extended view distance

- High-end visual effects similar to other premium shaders

- Peaceful and balanced visual tone for a calm experience

### How to report BUGS!!

Our GlacierDevelopment Discord server is Live you can report bugs and Chat with other GlacierShaders users, report bugs, get help with issues, and join exciting giveaways — all in one place!

[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/215a7d97b2377683257df59401bc3d1a76ea75b4.png)](https://discord.gg/TpsGTtTnSm)
